204.reason: In next(), after processing a token, the method may call retract() which decrements curPos. Then getChar() is called again, which increments curPos. This can cause the loop to skip characters or process the same character multiple times, leading to incorrect tokenization.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  In next(), after processing a token, the method may call retract() which decrements curPos. reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This should be LexType.OR, not LexType.AND. The token '|' (single pipe) is being incorrectly assigned the AND type even when it's part of a valid '||' or an invalid single '|'. In the case of '||', it should be OR; in the case of a single '|', an error is correctly reported, but the lexType is still wrongly set to AND, which may cause incorrect token output if error handling doesn't stop processing.]
